TraduoraCLI 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Ellpeck

  export     Export one or more translations to a file

  import     Import one or more translations from a file

commands.payload:
TraduoraCLI 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Ellpeck

  export     Export one or more translations to a file

  import     Import one or more translations from a file

  login      Log in using your traduora instance and save an auth token

  stats      Show the stats for the given project

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
TraduoraCLI 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Ellpeck

  -p, --project            Required.

  -l, --locales            Required. One or more language codes of the languages
                           that should be exported

  -f, --format             (Default: jsonflat) The format to export in. One of
                           androidxml, csv, xliff12, jsonflat, jsonnested,
                           yamlflat, yamlnested, properties, po, strings, php

  -d, --directory          (Default: .) The directory to store the files in,
                           relative to the current location

  -e, --extension          (Default: json) The resulting files' extension

  -c, --capitalize-name    When this is set, the resulting files' names will
                           start with a capital letter

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

  -p, --project      Required.

  -l, --locales      Required. One or more language codes of the languages that
                     should be imported

  -f, --format       (Default: jsonflat) The format that the files to import are

                     yamlflat, yamlnested, properties, po, strings, php

  -d, --directory    (Default: .) The directory that the translation files can

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

TraduoraCLI 1.0.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Ellpeck

  -s, --site           Required. The url of your traduora instance. Should be
                       https for security

  -u, --username       Required.

  -p, --password       Required.

  -c, --client-mode    Use a client id and secret instead of username and
                       password

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

staticCommands.name: export
staticCommands.description: Export one or more translations to a file

options.description: One or more language codes of the languages that should be exported
When this is set, the resulting files' names will start with a capital letter
The directory to store the files in, relative to the current location
The format to export in. One of androidxml, csv, xliff12, jsonflat, jsonnested, yamlflat, yamlnested, properties, po, strings, php

staticCommands.name: import
staticCommands.description: Import one or more translations from a file

options.description: One or more language codes of the languages that should be imported
The directory that the translation files can be found in, relative to the current location
The format that the files to import are in. One of androidxml, csv, xliff12, jsonflat, jsonnested, yamlflat, yamlnested, properties, po, strings, php

staticCommands.name: login
staticCommands.description: Log in using your traduora instance and save an auth token

options.description: The url of your traduora instance. Should be https for security
Use a client id and secret instead of username and password

staticCommands.name: stats
staticCommands.description: Show the stats for the given project
